Web Development
Remote
Full Time

Website Developer Intern

Career description

  • Job Description
  • Responsibilities
  • Requirements
  • Your Benefits

Job description

We are looking for detail-oriented website developer interns to design and build fast, responsive websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and CMS platforms.

Responsibilities

As a Web Developer Intern, you will be responsible for:

  • Develop visually appealing and mobile-friendly websites from scratch or templates
  • Assist with WordPress development and basic plugin integrations
  • Ensure cross-browser compatibility and fast loading times
  • Apply basic SEO and accessibility standards to web pages

Requirements

The ideal candidate should have:

  • Proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals
  • Interest in learning WordPress, SEO, and web performance optimization
  • Strong attention to detail and design-to-code accuracy

Your Benefits

We offer a comprehensive benefits package including:

  • Mentorship from experienced software engineers on real-world projects
  • Flexible work arrangements with remote options
  • Hands-on website projects with mentorship and design collaboration
  • Certification and resume-enhancing experience with a US-based team
  • Access to bonuses and real-world client exposure

Join our team and help shape the future of digital design while growing your career in an innovative environment.

Or drag and drop here

Accepted: PDF, DOC, DOCX, PNG, JPG (Max 5MB)

Application submitted!

We've received your application and will be in touch if there's a match. Thank you for your interest in joining Uxory.
